name: wait_for_webhook_started_by_event_demo
description: Demonstrates the workflowsToStart pattern. This workflow is started automatically when a webhook event arrives at a WebhookConfig that lists this workflow in its workflowsToStart map. No WAIT_FOR_WEBHOOK tasks are needed — the inbound payload is passed as the workflow's input directly. Configure your WebhookConfig with: {"workflowsToStart": {"wait_for_webhook_started_by_event_demo": 1}}.
